notableEvents.label: Adley Rutschman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Adley Rutschman grounds into a double play, second baseman Charles McAdoo to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Taylor Ward out at 2nd. Adley Rutschman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson lines out sharply to center fielder Daulton Varsho.

notableEvents.label: Gunnar Henderson reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Gunnar Henderson reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Ernie Clement.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game

notableEvents.label: Ernie Clement GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ernie Clement grounds into a double play, second baseman Jackson Holliday to first baseman Pete Alonso. George Springer out at 2nd. Ernie Clement out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ernie Clement rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ernie Clement grounds into a double play, second baseman Jackson Holliday to first baseman Pete Alonso. George Springer out at 2nd. Ernie Clement out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nathan Lukes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Lukes pops out to catcher Samuel Basallo in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Nathan Lukes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Lukes doubles (6) on a line drive to right fielder Tyler O'Neill.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Gunnar Henderson reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Ernie Clement.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
